questions.prompt: Did I reduce or avoid mechanism rather than add clever machinery?
Is the correct path now easier than the shortcut on the authoritative surfaces?
Did I avoid introducing routine babysitting operator tending or hidden upkeep burden?
Is the governing behavior now enforced mechanically on authoritative surfaces rather than merely explained?
Did I avoid speculative non-foundation work and keep the implementation inside the forced scope of the task?
Is there now exactly one valid path for this concern or an explicit migration path with end state and deadline?
Did I minimize knobs options and abstractions while keeping legitimate environment variance in env vars only?
Did I keep the implementation on the most proven operable and well understood technology that satisfies the contract?
If I am claiming done ready complete or mergeable is the claimed terminal state actually reached rather than merely prepared?
Have I closed every remaining authoritative loophole that would let another agent violate this concern without tripping machinery?
